vehicles.slot: Cap near selector base on console
shift: Turn ignition to ON.
Locate the shift lock slot: Cap near selector base on console.
Insert a thin key or flathead into the slot and press firmly down.
While holding the slot, press the brake pedal.
Move the selector to Neutral.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Connect jump pack to battery — Under hood.
Once 12V power is restored, press brake and shift to N normally.
If using slot without power, apply consistent firm pressure — hybrid selectors may require more force.
Hybrid: 12V auxiliary only — never touch HV battery.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: lift from front — front (drive) wheels in the air. AWD/PHEV: flatbed only. AWD without flatbed: wheel-lift with dollies on opposite axle. Wheel-lift max: 35 mph, 50 miles — flatbed preferred for longer distances.
towNotes: HYBRID/PHEV: Use 12V auxiliary battery ONLY for jumping. NEVER access the high-voltage battery pack.
FWD: lift from front (front/drive wheels in the air) freely. If rear-lift is not possible, place wheel dollies under the REAR wheels and tow front-first.

battery.jumpTerminals: Under hood — standard terminals. PHEV: 12V only.

shift: Turn the Mitsubishi Lancer / Lancer Evolution to ON/Ready mode.
Shift lock slot: Cap near selector base.
Insert a thin key or flathead into the slot and press firmly.
Press the brake pedal while holding the slot.
Move selector to N.
FLATBED ONLY — do not tow with driven wheels on the ground.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Connect jump pack to battery — Under hood.
Once 12V power is restored, press brake and shift to N normally.
NEVER touch the high-voltage traction battery.
FLATBED ONLY.
vehicles.notes: Evo X SST DCT: restore power first. Manual: clutch to N. AWD standard on Evo.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: lift from front — front (drive) wheels in the air. AWD: flatbed only. AWD without flatbed: wheel-lift with dollies on opposite axle. Wheel-lift max: 35 mph, 50 miles — flatbed preferred for longer distances.
towNotes: FWD: lift from front (front/drive wheels in the air) freely. If rear-lift is not possible, place wheel dollies under the REAR wheels and tow front-first.
MANUAL TRANSMISSION OPTION: If equipped with manual trans, no shift lock — depress clutch and select Neutral. No override slot needed.
CVT EQUIPPED: Do NOT exceed 35 mph or 50 miles with drive wheels on ground. Flatbed strongly preferred for CVTs.

battery.warnings: Evo SST DCT: restore power before shift.

shift: Turn ignition to ON.
This vehicle has a Jatco CVT — shift lock slot location: Cap near selector base.
Insert a thin key or small flathead into the slot.
Press firmly and hold.
Press the brake pedal while holding.
Move the selector to Neutral.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Connect jump pack to battery — Under hood.
Once 12V power is restored, press brake and shift to N normally.
CVT transmissions: do NOT exceed 35 mph or 50 miles with driven wheels on ground — flatbed strongly preferred.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: lift from front — front (drive) wheels in the air. AWD: flatbed only. AWD without flatbed: wheel-lift with dollies on opposite axle. Wheel-lift max: 35 mph, 50 miles — flatbed preferred for longer distances.
towNotes: FWD: lift from front (front/drive wheels in the air) freely. If rear-lift is not possible, place wheel dollies under the REAR wheels and tow front-first.
CVT EQUIPPED: Do NOT exceed 35 mph or 50 miles with drive wheels on ground. Flatbed strongly preferred for CVTs.

shift: Turn ignition to ON (do not start engine).
Locate the shift lock release: Cap near selector base.
Pry off the cap or cover if present using your ignition key or a small flathead.
Insert the key (or a thin flathead) into the slot and press firmly downward.
While holding the slot, press the brake pedal.
Move the selector from Park to Neutral.
Remove key from slot and replace cap.
neutral: Apply parking brake and chock wheels.
Connect jump pack to battery — Under hood.
Once 12V power is restored, press brake and shift to Neutral normally.
If power cannot be restored, use the shift lock slot above — Cap near selector base.
vehicles.towMethod: Lift from front — front (drive) wheels in the air, or flatbed. Wheel-lift max: 35 mph, 50 miles — flatbed preferred for longer distances.
towNotes: FWD: lift from front (front/drive wheels in the air) freely. If rear-lift is not possible, place wheel dollies under the REAR wheels and tow front-first.

vehicles.slot: Small cap near gear selector base on floor console
shift: Turn ignition to ON (do not start engine).
Locate the shift lock release: small cap near gear selector base on floor console.
Pry off cap with small flathead.
Insert key or thin flathead and press firmly downward.
While holding, press the brake pedal.
Move selector from Park to Neutral.
Remove tool and replace cap.
neutral: Apply parking brake and chock wheels.
Connect jump pack to battery — under the hood.
Once 12V power is restored, shift to Neutral.
Transfer case: shift to 2WD before road towing. Manual floor TC lever.
vehicles.notes: Manual TC floor lever on most. Must be in 2H for road towing. Manual: depress clutch.
vehicles.warn: Shift TC to 2H before road towing.
vehicles.towMethod: RWD/2WD: lift from rear. 4WD: shift TC to 2H first, then lift rear.

tc.type: Manual floor lever (Super Select 4WD or part-time)
positions: 4WD Hi — NOT safe for dry road
steps: MANUAL TRANSMISSION: depress clutch, select Neutral.

towNotes: Manual TC floor lever — shift to 2WD before road towing.
MANUAL TRANSMISSION: depress clutch, select Neutral.

vehicles.slot: Small cap near gear selector base on center console
shift: Turn ignition to ON (do not start engine).
Locate the shift lock release: small cap near gear selector base on center console.
Pry off cap with small flathead.
Insert key or thin flathead and press firmly downward.
While holding, press the brake pedal.
Move selector from Park to Neutral.
Remove tool and replace cap.
neutral: Apply parking brake and chock wheels.
Connect jump pack to battery — under the hood.
Once 12V power is restored, press brake and shift to Neutral normally.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: lift from front — front (drive) wheels in the air.

vehicles.slot: Small cap near gear selector base on center console
shift: Turn ignition to ON (do not start engine).
Locate the shift lock release: small cap near gear selector base on center console.
Pry off cap with small flathead.
Insert key or thin flathead and press firmly downward.
While holding, press the brake pedal.
Move selector from Park to Neutral.
Remove tool and replace cap.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
Connect jump pack to battery — under the hood.
Once 12V power is restored, shift to Neutral.
Manual: depress clutch, select Neutral.
AWD (VR-4): flatbed preferred.
vehicles.notes: Manual: depress clutch. AWD VR-4: flatbed preferred. Very low clearance — flatbed preferred for all.
vehicles.warn: AWD (VR-4): flatbed preferred. Very low clearance — flatbed preferred.
vehicles.towMethod: FWD: lift from front. AWD: flatbed preferred. Very low clearance — flatbed preferred for all.
towNotes: Very low ground clearance — flatbed preferred for all variants.

vehicles.slot: Electronic selector — no mechanical shift lock slot
shift: Turn vehicle to ON/Ready mode.
Electronic gear selector: press N on the selector while pressing the brake pedal.
If power is lost: restore 12V auxiliary battery under the hood.
Once powered, press N to select Neutral.
neutral: Apply parking brake.
FLATBED ONLY — electric drivetrain.
Connect jump pack to 12V auxiliary battery — under the hood.
12V AUXILIARY ONLY — NEVER touch HV battery.
Once powered, select Neutral.
FLATBED ONLY.
vehicles.notes: Electric city car. RWD (rear motor). Very small. 12V under hood. Flatbed only.
vehicles.warn: FLATBED ONLY. 12V auxiliary ONLY — never touch HV battery.
towNotes: 12V auxiliary under hood — never touch HV battery.

battery.warnings: FLATBED ONLY. Never touch HV battery.
